info.title: Tool to create distance fields from an image
info.description:
This is a tool that allows users to create a distance field PNG from an input image.
      The tool only looks at the transparency (alpha) channel.

options.name: --input
options.description: Input image file to compute distance field for

options.name: --output
options.description: Output PNG file to for the distance field

options.name: --radius
options.description: Radius of distance field in pixels [default: 32]

options.name: --padding
options.description: Padding applied to distance field image [default: 0]
